description: After a full wall-to-wall physical inventory count, an accountant must reconcile the physical counts with the system records and post the financial adjustment.

nodes.task_description: Upload the final physical count file into the inventory system.

expected_outcome.expected: The physical counts are loaded into the system.

nodes.task_description: Run a variance report comparing the system's on-hand quantities to the physical counts.

expected_outcome.expected: A report is generated showing all items with discrepancies (shrinkage or overages).

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total financial value of the net variance.

expected_outcome.expected: The total value of the inventory adjustment is calculated.

nodes.task_description: Post the inventory adjustments to update the system quantities and send the financial entry to the general ledger.

expected_outcome.expected: The system inventory is updated to match the physical count, and the financial impact is recorded.
